_comment: Tier-2 for NGSolve heat#0: BilinearForm(..., nonsym=True) emits 'kwarg "nonsym" is an undocumented flags option for class ... BilinearForm, maybe there is a typo?'. The kwarg has no effect on matrix sparsity. Catalog text rewritten to flag this as a no-op drift. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
